title: Adobe CJM ExperienceEvent - Sub-Tenant Context
description: Sub-tenant identification context for multi-tenant message delivery scenarios inside a sandbox.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Sub-Tenant
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Sub-tenant context for partitioning message delivery feedback data within a multi-tenant sandbox.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Sub-Tenant Identifier
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Identifies the sub-tenant within a multi-tenant sandbox. Used to partition message delivery feedback data across logical tenant boundaries.
